summary: Made surgical seam edits to strengthen the handoff from chapter 4's noon setup into Gideon's launch and to sharpen the closing bridge toward chapter 6's breakfast-and-kitchen aftermath, without changing scene beats or character voice.
edits: Shifted the opening sentence to a direct noon anchor that picks up the prior chapter's final time cue.
Clarified Silas's Sump Ward reflection as same-morning carryover from the previous chapter.
Added a concise breakfast/downhill consequence beat to the closing paragraph to hand off into the next chapter's aftermath.
